The '''Loro Babis system''' was a binary [[Star system/Legends|star system]] located within the [[Sith Worlds/Legends|Sith Worlds]] region of the [[Esstran sector/Legends|Esstran sector]] in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]] of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]], which contained three uninhabited [[Planet/Legends|planets]].<ref name="TotJC" />

==History==
[[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Chamma]] traveled to the system with two other Jedi to investigate a Republic aligned [[Distress beacon/Legends|emergency beacon]]. The small taskforce landed on the second planet, [[Athiss/Legends|Athiss]], to investigate. Encountering a dark side beast there, he believed he brushed the dark side and had failed a test of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]].

{{System-stub}}
